prompt: I need a job description for a Senior Software Engineer in our Platform team. They'll be building internal developer tools and CI/CD infrastructure. We're based in London, hybrid 3 days a week. Salary range is £85,000 to £110,000. The team is 6 people and this person will mentor 2 mid-level engineers.
assertions: Leads with THE WORK section before requirements
Essential requirements list contains 5 or fewer items, each genuinely essential
Includes equal opportunities statement and reasonable adjustments offer
Zero instances of exclusionary language (rockstar, ninja, guru, digital native, young and dynamic)
Requirements expressed as skill proficiency levels, not years of experience with specific tools
Output begins with the mandatory header block (TASK, DOCUMENT TYPE, JURISDICTION, CONFIGURATION, SENSITIVITY)
